overall.description: Cinematic third-person gameplay from Ghost of Tsushima featuring a samurai character standing under a traditional wooden shrine pavilion, observing a dramatic stormy landscape with mountains, misty valleys, and yellow flowering trees. The character briefly removes their straw hat in a contemplative moment while storm clouds gather overhead.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden shrine pavilion overlooking stormy mountain valley

events.description: character briefly removes straw hat then replaces it while observing the landscape

agents.ego_description: samurai character stands under pavilion roof gazing at the stormy vista, briefly removes hat in a contemplative gesture

entered.detail: traditional Japanese wooden roof structure with curved tiles providing shelter

hillside covered with trees bearing yellow blossoms visible through the mist
low-lying fog and mist filling the valleys between hills

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a cinematic view from behind a samurai character standing under a traditional wooden pavilion. Dark storm clouds gather over a mountainous landscape dotted with yellow flowering trees. The character briefly removes their straw hat around the 4-second mark in a contemplative gesture, then continues observing the dramatic weather as mist drifts through the valleys below.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden shrine pavilion overlooking stormy mountain valley

agents.ego_description: character remains stationary, maintaining a contemplative gaze on the stormy landscape with subtle shifts in posture

segments.scene_description: The scene continues with the samurai maintaining their position under the pavilion, silently observing the storm as it develops over the mountains. The camera holds steady on the atmospheric vista, capturing the shifting clouds and mist in the valley without any significant changes to the scene composition.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a steady camera perspective from behind a samurai that captures a moment of quiet contemplation as a storm gathers over a mountainous landscape. It begins with the character standing under a traditional wooden pavilion, observing dark clouds rolling in over distant peaks and yellow flowering trees. As the atmosphere grows more dramatic, the samurai briefly removes their straw hat in a reflective gesture before returning to their silent vigil. The scene then holds on the atmospheric vista, emphasizing the shifting movement of the storm clouds and the thick mist drifting through the valleys below.
